improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion: <meta name="description" content="Gideon is your Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support. Try 3 free searches, then unlock unlimited access from US$2/day."><meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Meet Gideon, Your AI Trade & Business Assistant"><meta property="og:description" content="Instant AI answers for business owners, traders, and professionals. Voice chat, unlimited workspace, and expert trade support. Start with 3 free searches."><meta property="og:type" content="website"><meta property="og:image" content="https://gdn.ai/og-image.jpg"><meta property="og:url" content="https://gdn.ai/"><meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
improvements.rationale: A compelling meta description improves click-through rates from search results by clearly stating the value proposition (Claude-powered AI assistant) and the free trial offer. Open Graph tags ensure professional, branded previews when the homepage is shared on LinkedIn, Twitter, or Facebook—critical for B2B audiences. Including the price point builds trust and pre-qualifies visitors.

improvements.suggestion:
Your AI-Powered Trade & Business Assistant

Meet Gideon — get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support for your business operations. Try three free searches, then unlock unlimited access.
improvements.rationale: This headline immediately communicates what Gideon is (AI assistant) and who it's for (trade and business). The subheading highlights three key value props (instant answers, voice chat, professional support) while clearly stating the free trial offer. The copy is direct and builds trust without overpromising.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches, you'll be invited to become a Gideon member to continue accessing unlimited AI-powered trade and business support. Membership starts from just US$2 per day, with flexible monthly or annual billing options—annual plans save you 30 percent. Your free searches give you a genuine feel for how Gideon can support your business before you commit.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common friction point in a freemium model—what happens at the paywall. It reassures prospects by framing the trial as a genuine preview, clearly states pricing without hidden surprises, and highlights the annual savings incentive. Reducing uncertainty at this conversion moment builds trust and encourages sign-ups.
